sections.paragraph: m. an associate, a companion, fellow. Son 1:7 8:13 Jud. 20:11 , כְּאִישׁ אֶחָד חֲבֵרִים “all associated as one man;” Psal. 119:63 Psal. 45:8 , מֵחֲבֵרֶיךָ “above thy fellows,” i.e. other kings (comp. Barhebr. p. 328). [This application of Psa 45:1-17, contradicts what we know to be its meaning; namely, that the king is the Lord Jesus ( Heb 1:8), the fellows his “brethren” ( Heb 2:11, 12 ).]
